summary: Card Analytics Dashboard feature testing complete. Backend: 16/16 tests passed - GET /api/reports/card-analytics/{user_id} endpoint returns valid data with summary (KPIs, trend percentages, averages), card_type_breakdown (6 types), top_cards (sorted by engagement), daily_trend, and per_user breakdown (including card_types and vs_avg comparisons). Frontend: All UI sections render correctly - Header with back button, period selector (7D/14D/30D/90D/1Y), hero KPIs, averages, card type breakdown, daily activity chart, top performing cards table. Card Analytics link exists in /analytics Detailed Reports section.

integration_issues.issue: React Native for Web does not render data-testid attributes to DOM elements. The attributes are defined in code but don't appear in rendered HTML.
integration_issues.priority: LOW - UI works correctly, only affects automated testing selectors

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Backend GET /api/reports/card-analytics/{user_id} at line 1327 returns all required fields
VERIFIED: summary includes total_cards, total_views, total_downloads, total_shares, cards_trend_pct, views_trend_pct, avg_views_per_card, avg_downloads_per_card
VERIFIED: card_type_breakdown array contains card_type, count, views, downloads, shares per type (6 types found: birthday, congrats, thankyou, holiday, anniversary, welcome)
VERIFIED: top_cards sorted by engagement score (views + downloads*2 + shares*3) in descending order
VERIFIED: daily_trend array contains date, cards, views, downloads, shares per day
VERIFIED: per_user array includes card_types breakdown and vs_avg_cards comparison for managers
VERIFIED: scope='organization' returned for super_admin user (69a0b7095fddcede09591667)
VERIFIED: days parameter works for all values (7, 14, 30, 90, 365)
VERIFIED: Frontend cards.tsx at line 99 has back button with data-testid
VERIFIED: Frontend cards.tsx at line 117 has period selector chips with data-testid
VERIFIED: Frontend cards.tsx at line 129 has hero KPI section with data-testid
VERIFIED: Card Analytics link added to /analytics/index.tsx in Detailed Reports section (line 311-316)
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data - 33 cards across 6 types with views/downloads/shares metrics
context_for_next_testing_agent: Card Analytics Dashboard is fully functional. Backend API returns real data from congrats_cards collection. Frontend page at /analytics/cards renders all sections. Period selector changes API call parameter. Card Analytics link in main /analytics page navigates correctly. Note: data-testid attributes don't render in DOM due to React Native Web behavior - use text selectors for automation.

response_structure.card_type_breakdown: Array of {card_type, count, views, downloads, shares}
response_structure.per_user: Array of per-user breakdown with card_types and vs_avg

frontend_verified.Header: Shows 'Card Analytics' with scope and period
frontend_verified.Hero KPIs: Cards Created, Total Views, Downloads, Shares with trend badges
frontend_verified.Averages: Avg Views/Card and Avg Downloads/Card displayed
frontend_verified.Card type breakdown: Bar charts for each of 6 card types with icons/colors
frontend_verified.Daily activity chart: Bar chart showing daily cards created
frontend_verified.Top performing cards: Table with rank, customer, type, rep, views, DL, shares, score
frontend_verified.Navigation from /analytics: Card Analytics link in Detailed Reports section works
